ops.body: Implemented end-to-end in W3 (a02e4858): bridge._quote emits connections (non-final legs' arrival airports, both fli and SerpApi sources; the fli OKA/NAH alias rewritten back via the shared helper — review-caught), the bridge-artifact validator requires connections with one airport per stop, composed cash legs store it, fit exposes it in cash-leg facts, avoid_transit vetoes cash-hop connections like award connections, and the transit collector prompt checks each connection airport individually (generic multi-stop flagging forbidden by the prompt). Covered by parameterized tests across both quote sources, validator strictness both directions, and veto semantics. The 2026-07-14 live capstone exercised bridge (30 quotes with validated connections); its final board carried no hybrid journeys (no cash legs among the 220 composed), so the transit collector's per-airport pass awaits the next hybrid-bearing run — the contract it executes is shipped and tested.
